Pregledajte prijavljene kvarove, filtrir: Browse reported issues, filter by status, and open an item for details or editing.
Od otvaranja forme do slanja prijave sti: From opening the form to sending the report takes only a few seconds. Describe the issue, add a photo if you want, and send it.
Kratko opišite kvar i, ako želite, dodaj: Briefly describe the issue and, if you want, add photos. Everything important should fit in a few quick steps.
Dodajte stan, hitnost ili fotografiju sa: Add the apartment, urgency, or a photo only if they help the manager act faster.
Pošaljite prijavu odmah, a dodatne detal: Send the report now, and you can add extra details later in a comment.
Navedite gde je problem nastao i kada st: State where the problem happened and when you noticed it.
Ako postoji hitnost, izaberite odgovaraj: If it is urgent, choose the appropriate priority.
Na primer: Lift ne radi od jutros, vrata: For example: The elevator has not worked since this morning, the doors are not closing, and other residents cannot use it.
Pošaljite osnovnu informaciju odmah, a d: Send the core information now, and add details later if needed.
Dodajte fotografiju iz galerije ili odma: Add a photo from the gallery or open the camera right away.
Fotografija često ubrzava dodelu i rešav: A photo often speeds up assignment and resolution.
Ažurirajte status, prioritet, zaduženje: Update the status, priority, assignee, and extra details in the same ticket.
Skenirali ste onboarding QR kod za zgrad: You scanned the onboarding QR code for :building. Complete this short form and your building manager will review it.
Trenutno ne kreiramo korisnički nalog do: Your account will be created only after the manager approves your request.
This takes less than one minute.
Komšije rade na Android i iPhone uređaji: Komšije works on both Android and iPhone devices.
Nakon odobrenja dobićete postojeći Komši: After approval, you will receive the standard Komšije invite by email and continue with regular registration.
Važne informacije, kratka obaveštenja i: Important information, short notices, and manager announcements are all in one place.
Objava treba da bude jasna i kratka, sa: The announcement should be clear and concise, with a publish time if it is not for immediate release.
Naslov neka bude kratak i prepoznatljiv: Keep the title short and recognizable already in the announcements list.
U prvom pasusu navedite šta stanari treb: In the first paragraph, explain what residents should know or do.
Ako nije hitno, možete sačuvati nacrt i: If it is not urgent, you can save it as a draft and publish later.
Ažurirajte sadržaj, vreme objave ili sta: Update the content, publish time, or publication status for this message.
Dodajte aplikaciju na početni ekran radi: Add the app to your home screen for quicker access and a full-screen experience.

Komšije je platforma za profesionalne up: Komšije is a platform for professional building managers and management companies: tickets, announcements, polls and resident communication in one place, with a 30-day free trial.
30 dana besplatnog probnog perioda, bez: A 30-day free trial, with no obligation.
Komšije je platforma koja upravnicima zg: Komšije is a platform that lets building managers and management companies handle tickets, announcements, polls and day-to-day communication with residents in one place - clearly, transparently and without the chaos.
Prijavite svoju zgradu za probni period: Register your building for a trial
Svakodnevno upravljanje zgradom najčešće: Day-to-day building management usually happens through calls and messages that easily get lost. Komšije replaces those flows with a single, clear place.
Upravnik dnevno prima desetine poziva za: Managers receive dozens of calls a day about the same issues, with no record of any of them.
Važne informacije se gube između stotina: Important information gets lost among hundreds of unrelated messages.
Prijava kvara prosleđena u razgovoru lak: An issue mentioned in a chat easily goes unrecorded and unresolved.
Ne zna se ko je šta prijavio, kada i da: There is no way to know who reported what, when, and whether it was resolved.
Stanari i upravnik nemaju zajednički kan: Residents and managers have no shared channel, so information is passed on by word of mouth.
Stanari ne vide status svojih prijava ni: Residents cannot see the status of their tickets or the decisions that affect the building.
Sve što je upravniku potrebno za vođenje: Everything a manager needs to run a building, brought together in a single app available on both desktop and phone.
Objavite važne informacije svim stanarim: Publish important information to all residents at once, with a record of who has read it.
Pratite kvarove kroz jasne statuse, kome: Track issues through clear statuses, comments, assignees and a complete history.
Donosite odluke zajedno sa stanarima uz: Make decisions together with residents through quick and transparent polls.
Stanari odmah dobijaju obaveštenja o kva: Residents are instantly notified about tickets, announcements and polls on their phone.
Jedan zajednički kanal za sve stanare um: One shared channel for all residents instead of scattered messages and calls.
Komšije se instalira kao aplikacija na t: Komšije installs as an app on the phone, with no app store required.
Uvođenje Komšija je jednostavno i ne zah: Getting started with Komšije is simple and requires no technical setup on your side.
Platforma za profesionalne upravnike zgr: A platform for professional building managers.
Javite nam se i dogovorimo osnovne detal: Get in touch and we agree on the basic details about the building.
Postavljamo zgradu, stanove i vaš upravn: We set up the building, apartments and your manager account.
Stanari dobijaju pozivnicu ili QR kod za: Residents receive an invitation or a QR code for quick sign-up and access to their building.
Isprobajte sve funkcionalnosti u realnom: Try all the features in real, day-to-day use.
Bez pritiska odlučujete da li ostajete n: You decide, with no pressure, whether to stay on the platform.
Isprobajte Komšije u punom kapacitetu, b: Try Komšije at full capacity, with no predefined obligation and no risk to your data.
Tokom probnog perioda imate pristup svim: During the trial you have access to every capability of the platform.
Ne potpisujete ugovor i niste u obavezi: You sign no contract and are under no obligation to continue.
Blagovremeno vas obaveštavamo pre kraja: We notify you in good time before the trial ends.
I nakon isteka probnog perioda vaši poda: Even after the trial expires, your data remains preserved.
Podaci vaše zgrade i stanara zaštićeni s: Your building's and residents' data is protected on multiple levels.
Sva komunikacija je šifrovana i zaštićen: All communication is encrypted and protected in transit.
Podaci svake zgrade su odvojeni i vidlji: Each building's data is separated and visible only to its members.
Pristup je moguć samo uz proveren nalog: Access is possible only with a verified account and personal credentials.
Podaci se redovno arhiviraju kako ništa: Data is archived regularly so that nothing is lost.
Odgovori na pitanja koja upravnici najče: Answers to the questions managers most often ask before adopting the platform.
Stanari se mogu prijaviti putem pozivnic: Residents can sign up using an invitation or by scanning a QR code and immediately access their building. No technical setup is required.
Da. Komšije radi na iPhone uređajima kro: Yes. Komšije works on iPhone devices through the web browser and can be added to the home screen as an app.
Da. Na Android uređajima Komšije se inst: Yes. On Android devices Komšije installs as a PWA app and supports push notifications.
Ne. Stanari ne plaćaju korišćenje platfo: No. Residents do not pay to use the platform; it is intended for the building manager.
After 30 days you choose whether to continue. Your data is preserved even if the trial expires.
Da. Nalog i podaci se mogu ponovo aktivi: Yes. The account and data can be reactivated at any time, without losing history.
Započnite 30 dana besplatno i uverite se: Start 30 days free and see how much simpler managing a building is with Komšije.
We respond as soon as possible.
